summary: Address Greptile PR review: move novel tables to canonical migrateExtras (extras.go) so read-only pull --from-collection finds them; quota surfaces non-2xx as an auth error instead of -1/-1; remove dead pull --launch variable.
reason: Novel tables (pp_collections, pp_stat_snapshots) were created ad-hoc in ensurePixabayTables, which read-only store opens (pull --from-collection) skip — causing a 'no such table' crash on a sync-only DB. extras.go migrateExtras is the canonical location and runs on every write-capable open.
validated_outcome: go vet/test/build green; collection add (write) creates tables via migration; read-only pull --from-collection resolves them; missing-table read path returns empty gracefully.
